title: YongleAI public code release: multi-engine candidate-annotation and validation pipeline for Yongle Palace Taoist mural image patches
description: Public software release metadata for the multi-engine candidate-annotation, validation, and packaging pipeline supporting the Scientific Data Data Descriptor for Yongle Palace Taoist mural image patches. The public GitHub repository is https://github.com/lbiceice/yongleai-scidata-pipeline and the DOI-backed release tag is v1.0.1.

creators.name: Liang, Bingbing
creators.affiliation: AI Engineering College, Guangzhou College of Technology and Business; Faculty of Fine and Applied Arts, Khon Kaen University (PhD student in Culture, Fine Arts and Design Research)

notes: GitHub repository: https://github.com/lbiceice/yongleai-scidata-pipeline; release tag: v1.0.1; software version DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20430149; software concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20430148.
